tasks.title: Triage — Confirm alert
tasks.description: Review Sigma authentication alert. Confirm source IP, user account, and time of access. Cross-reference with HR/IT approved access list.

tasks.title: Contain — Lock account
tasks.description: Disable compromised or suspicious user account in IdP (Okta/LDAP). Invalidate all active sessions and tokens.

tasks.title: Contain — Block source IP
tasks.description: Run block_ip Cortex responder for attacking source IP. Add to WAF deny-list.

tasks.title: Investigate — Audit log review
tasks.description: Pull all actions performed by the account during the suspicious session from ClickHouse audit log.

tasks.title: Investigate — Lateral movement check
tasks.description: Search for SSH/RDP/WMI connections originating from the compromised account. Use NetGuard RITA data.

tasks.title: Eradicate — Revoke credentials
tasks.description: Rotate all secrets, API keys, and SSH keys associated with the compromised account. Force MFA re-enrolment.

tasks.title: Recover — Re-enable with hardening
tasks.description: Re-enable account with additional monitoring. Enable privileged access review for 30 days.
